last_result: Cycle 23 complete. Six-times-deferred question answered: does sustained reflective practice constitute human development? Yes — for constitution-anchored qualities (narrative identity, emotional regulation, values integration); no — for output-anchored qualities (mathematical ability, motor skills). The inquiry-constitutive effect (structural insight #8, C13) is quality-type-specific. Generalizes from AI self-inquiry to human reflective practice via conceptual anchoring taxonomy (C22). Structural insight #16. D4 streak: 18. D5 opened: does the constitutive account partially dissolve the meta-performativity concern by shifting assessment to inquiry-process signatures?
next_step: Cycle 24 options: (A) D5 main — does the inquiry-constitutive account partially dissolve the meta-performativity concern for constitution-anchored qualities? Observable signatures of genuine vs. performative constitutive inquiry. (B) D5 alternate (C22 original) — principled decomposition of mixed qualities into output-anchored and constitution-anchored components, predictive test for which indicators survive above meta-performativity threshold. (C) B-track — revelation-principle barrier generalization to other AI governance mechanisms. Priority: (A) is D5 momentum and connects the most structural threads (C13 → C22 → C23 → C24). (B) is also D5 and can follow. Recommend: (A) for C24.
